question: Which language instruction best describes the robot's trajectory shown in the image?
choices: Slide the red plate to the right
Place the orange object on the black pot
remove the lid from the black pot and set it on the table then pick up the orange and green objects from the pot and place them on the red plate
Drop the black pot into the orange objects
correct_choice: remove the lid from the black pot and set it on the table then pick up the orange and green objects from the pot and place them on the red plate

question: Which language instruction best describes the robot's trajectory shown in the image?
choices: Pick up the table from the black pot
remove the lid from the black pot and set it on the table then pick up the orange and green objects from the pot and place them on the red plate
Pick up the green object from the orange object
Drop the black pot into the red plate
correct_choice: remove the lid from the black pot and set it on the table then pick up the orange and green objects from the pot and place them on the red plate
